query:
SELECT id, name, description, category 
FROM grants 
WHERE description = ''
   OR description IS NULL
ORDER BY id
LIMIT 50;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user cK99zxEtGoTfC1g.7228e2c6a840 --database ne96tB4yURpkfMNLLJuy9T --execute SELECT id, name, description, category 
FROM grants 
WHERE description = ''
   OR description IS NULL
ORDER BY id
LIMIT 50;
